source_name: FCAI VFACTS - EV share of new vehicle sales

fields.scope: FCAI VFACTS reports monthly new light vehicle sales by powertrain. BEV = battery electric, PHEV = plug-in hybrid, HEV = hybrid (no plug). Heavy vehicles tracked separately.
fields.primary_source_document: FCAI VFACTS monthly sales results (Federal Chamber of Automotive Industries).
fields.keying_plan: Key monthly BEV / PHEV / HEV / ICE share for the latest 13 months so the page can show year-on-year. Cross-check Electric Vehicle Council quarterly summary.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed monthly EV share. Australia's BEV share of new light vehicle sales has risen rapidly (from <1% in 2020 to ~8-10% by 2024-25); penetration lags Norway/EU/UK/China but is growing. The New Vehicle Efficiency Standard from January 2025 is the main policy driver.
citation: Federal Chamber of Automotive Industries, VFACTS monthly sales results.
